activities_projects.title: Friction and Motion Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Understand the effect of friction on motion
steps: Place a smooth board and a rough cloth surface
Roll a toy car on both surfaces
Measure the distance travelled in each case
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand that friction opposes motion

activities_projects.title: Acceleration by Different Forces
activities_projects.objective: Observe relation between force and acceleration
steps: Attach one rubber band to pull the cart

activities_projects.title: Mass and Inertia Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand relation between mass and inertia
steps: Push both boxes with equal force
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn heavier objects have greater inertia

activities_projects.title: Momentum Demonstration
activities_projects.objective: Understand effect of mass and velocity on momentum
steps: Release both balls from the same ramp
Observe impact on a soft object
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand momentum depends on mass and velocity

activities_projects.title: Newton's Second Law Observation
steps: Attach a spring balance to a cart
Pull the cart with constant force
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand acceleration decreases with increasing mass

activities_projects.title: Collision Investigation
steps: Roll two cars towards each other
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students observe Newton’s third law during collision

activities_projects.title: Stopping Distance Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Understand force required to stop motion
steps: Roll a toy car down a ramp
Stop it with a soft barrier
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand momentum and stopping force

activities_projects.title: Walking and Reaction Forces
steps: Note the direction of force applied by feet
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand real-life application of Newton’s third law

activities_projects.title: Seatbelt Safety Demonstration
steps: Place toy figure on moving toy car
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand inertia and safety importance
